title: Siemens India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Siemens India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Siemens India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Siemens India:
Siemens India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India!
